title: Auto-grant admin access to logged-in Internet Identity principal

requirements.text: Update the backend so that the first Internet Identity principal to log in is automatically set as the admin, or if an admin is already set, provide a way to bootstrap admin access by setting the deployer's principal as the admin on canister initialization.

quotes: your logged-in account automatically has admin access

acceptanceCriteria: On canister initialization, the deployer's principal (caller of the init function) is automatically assigned as the admin
If an admin principal is already set, it is preserved and not overwritten
The isAdmin query returns true for the principal set during initialization

requirements.text: Update the frontend admin check flow so that after a user logs in with Internet Identity, the app immediately reflects their admin status without requiring a manual page refresh.

quotes: your logged-in account automatically has admin access

acceptanceCriteria: After Internet Identity login completes, the admin status query is re-fetched automatically
Admin navigation links and the admin panel become accessible without requiring a page reload
Non-admin users still see the AccessDeniedScreen when navigating to the admin panel

constraints: Do not remove or break existing Internet Identity authentication flow
Do not change the existing book catalog, order, or user profile data structures
nonGoals: Adding a traditional username/password authentication system
Supporting multiple admin accounts via a UI management panel
Changing any branding or visual design
